name: contigion-metatrader
documentation:
# contigion-metatrader
A template repo for future Contigion repositories

[![Pylint](https://github.com/Contigion/metatrader/actions/workflows/pylint.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/Contigion/utils/actions/workflows/pylint.yml)
[![Publish to PyPI](https://github.com/Contigion/metatrader/actions/workflows/publish.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/Contigion/utils/actions/workflows/publish.yml)
[![Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/contigion-metatrader?style=flat)](https://pypi.org/project/contigion-utils/)
[![PyPi Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/contigion-metatrader?style=flat)](https://pypi.org/project/contigion-utils/)

## Installation
To install the library, simply run:

`
pip install contigion-metatrader
`

## Usage
You can use any of the functions in this library by importing them. For example:


``` python

```

## Contributions

Contributions are welcome! 
If you find any issues or want to improve the library, feel free to submit an issue.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_account_balance
documentation: Retrieve the account balance formatted as a string.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_account_credit_balance
documentation: Retrieve the account credit balance formatted as a string.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_account_number
documentation: Retrieve the account number and server information formatted as a string.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_account_name
documentation: Retrieve the account name.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_net_profit
documentation: Calculate the total net profit from all positions.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_open_net_profit
documentation: Calculate the net profit from open positions.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_free_margin
documentation: Retrieve the free margin.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_used_margin
documentation: Retrieve the used margin.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.account.get_account_exposure
documentation: Calculate the total exposure of the account.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.open_long_trade
documentation:
Place a long trade for the specified symbol.

Args:
    symbol (str): The trading symbol.
    volume (float): The trade volume.
    stop_loss (float, optional): The stop loss in pips. Defaults to 0.
    take_profit (float, optional): The take profit in pips. Defaults to 0.
    comment (str, optional): Comment for the trade. Defaults to "PipsPy".

Returns:
    result: The result of the order execution.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the symbol is invalid or volume is non-positive.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.open_short_trade
documentation:
Place a short trade for the specified symbol.

Args:
    symbol (str): The trading symbol.
    volume (float): The trade volume.
    stop_loss (float, optional): The stop loss in pips. Defaults to 0.
    take_profit (float, optional): The take profit in pips. Defaults to 0.
    comment (str, optional): Comment for the trade. Defaults to "PipsPy Open Order".

Returns:
    result: The result of the order execution.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the symbol is invalid or volume is non-positive.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.close_trade
documentation:
Close the specified order by ticket.

Args:
    ticket (int): The ticket number of the order to close.

Returns:
    result: The result of the order execution, or an error message if the ticket does not exist.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.adjust_take_profit
documentation: Adjust the take profit for a given trade ticket.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.adjust_stop_loss
documentation: Adjust the stop loss for a given trade ticket.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.actions.adjust_stops
documentation: Adjust the take profit and stop loss for a given trade ticket.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.close_profits
documentation: Close all profitable positions.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.close_losses
documentation: Close all losing positions.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.close_all_trades
documentation: Close all open trades.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.close_last_trade
documentation: Close the most recent trade.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.get_open_trades
documentation:
Retrieve all open trades.

Returns:
    list: A list of open positions.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.get_open_trade
documentation:
Retrieve a specific open trade by ticket.

Args:
    ticket (int): The trade ticket number.

Returns:
    object: The position object if found; otherwise, None.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.trades.trades_in_profit
documentation: Count the number of profitable trades.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.connect.disconnect
documentation: Shut down the MetaTrader 5 connection.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.data.get_market_data
documentation:
Retrieve market data for a given symbol and timeframe.

Args:
    symbol (str): The trading symbol.
    timeframe (int): The timeframe value from MetaTrader.
    number_of_candles (int): The number of candles to retrieve.

Returns:
    DataFrame: A DataFrame containing the market data.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If data retrieval fails.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.data.get_symbol_names
documentation:
Retrieve a list of available symbol names.

Returns:
    list: A list of symbol names.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If symbols retrieval fails.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.data.get_timeframe_value
documentation:
Get the corresponding MetaTrader timeframe value.

Args:
    timeframe (str): The timeframe string (e.g., 'M1').

Returns:
    int: The corresponding timeframe value.

Raises:
    KeyError: If the timeframe is not recognized.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.mappers.get_market_price_map
documentation:
Retrieve market prices for the given position's symbol.

Args:
    position (object): The position object from which to get the symbol.

Returns:
    dict: A mapping of order types to current market prices.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If symbol information retrieval fails.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.mappers.convert_signal
documentation:
Convert 'buy' and 'sell' signals in the DataFrame to numerical values.

Args:
    data (pd.DataFrame): The DataFrame containing the 'signal' column.

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: A new DataFrame with the 'signal' column converted.

modules.name: contigion_metatrader.config
documentation: mt_requests

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.history.get_trade_history
documentation:
Retrieve trade history within a specified time range or year.

Parameters:
    hours_ago (int, optional): Number of hours ago to start the history range.
    days_ago (int, optional): Number of days ago to start the history range.
    year (int, optional): Year to retrieve the history for (uses January 1st as the start date).
    is_close_history (bool, optional): If True, filters for close trade history; otherwise, filters for open trades.

Returns:
    list: List of trades matching the criteria.

Raises:
    ValueError: If none or multiple time parameters are provided simultaneously.
    RuntimeError: If trade history retrieval fails.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.history.get_profit_loss_history
documentation: Get the profit and loss history.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.history.get_profit_loss_history_totals
documentation: Calculate total profit and loss.

functions.name: contigion_metatrader.history.get_profit_loss_history_count
documentation: Count the number of profitable and losing trades.
